subcodes.first_line: O thou who art conscious of mysteries and joy of the righteous! Thou hast, in truth, arisen to serve the Cause of God and laid a firm foundation [3.5s]... ...It is imperative to acquire the knowledge of divine proofs and evidences, and to acquaint oneself with convincing testimonies which demonstrate the revelation of God's resplendent Light
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای واقف اسرار و سرور ابرار فی الحقیقه بخدمت امرالله پرداختی بنیان متین در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for teaching, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
